creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #3)
(In reply to J. B. from comment #2)

Agree with Daniel, this is another issue

In new PR don't forget to fill a complete and accurate
description of the issue you are experiencing with :

 * a description of your environment, OSs versions
   the file systems in both sides (UFS/ZFS/NFS)
   and the files you are copying
 * The full command you type, with all the switches,
   you can of course hide the sensitive datas such as account name,
   IP address or DNS names
 * The full error messages
 * If possible, the steps to reproduce the error

This will help with the analysis.

Regards
-- rodrigo
